expected_outcome: Competent AI engineer with an understanding of machine learning algorithms, deep learning neural networks, natural language processing, and model deployment strategies.

topics.name: Python for AI
subtopics: Pandas for dataframes and data cleaning

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily implementing vector operations, statistics formulas, and doing basic data analysis in Jupyter Notebooks.

mini_project.title: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) Report
mini_project.description: Analyze a real-world dataset (e.g., housing prices) and create statistical summary charts, matrix operations, and clean out missing values.

phases.milestone: Strong foundation in the mathematics driving AI algorithms and command over Python data packages.

topics.name: Supervised Learning
subtopics: Evaluation Metrics (Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1, ROC-AUC)

phases.practice_schedule: 2.5 Hours daily building model training workflows using Scikit-Learn.

mini_project.title: Customer Segmentation & Heart Disease Predictor
mini_project.description: Create a classification model to predict disease presence and group users into segments based on spending habits using K-Means.

phases.milestone: Equipped to choose, train, evaluate, and tune classical machine learning models for tabular data.

topics.name: Computer Vision (CNNs)
subtopics: Image Classification with PyTorch or TensorFlow

phases.practice_schedule: 3 Hours daily writing deep learning code using PyTorch, setting up neural network layers, and training on GPU.

mini_project.title: Image Classifier & Sentiment Analysis Model
mini_project.description: Build an image classifier using transfer learning on custom images, and a text classifier using embeddings to analyze review sentiments.

phases.milestone: Proficient in designing and training multi-layer perceptrons, CNNs, and recurrent networks for audio/text/image data.

topics.name: Model Deployment & MLOps
subtopics: Creating APIs for models with FastAPI

phases.practice_schedule: 2.5 Hours daily packing neural models into microservices and deploying on local or cloud hosts.

mini_project.title: AI-Powered Translation or Chatbot API
mini_project.description: Serve a lightweight language model or computer vision model behind a FastAPI endpoint containerized with Docker.

phases.milestone: Ready to take research-level models, integrate NLP utilities, and deploy them as reliable production APIs.

major_projects.title: Autonomous Object Detection & Alert System
major_projects.description: A real-time object detection system using YOLO or a fine-tuned SSD, detecting objects via webcam feed and triggering API alerts upon detecting specific items.

major_projects.title: End-to-End Predictive Analytics Pipeline
major_projects.description: A production-grade pipeline that auto-ingests database records, performs feature engineering, retrains an ensemble ML model, exposes predictions via a secure web dashboard, and logs performance metrics.
